'''Dakot Seven''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dakot system/Legends|Dakot system]] of the [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> An academically-minded world, it was the location of [[Dakot Tech]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Technical Branch Outpost]].<ref name="BI" /> It was the site of the [[Battle on Dakot Seven]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Onslaught]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[Black Ice (adventure)|''Black Ice'']] {{1st}}
